task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenMRS Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'https://localhost/openmrs/admin' or the OpenMRS Administration page is visible.

task_completion.description: Log in using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS login screen with username 'superman' entered, or the OpenMRS dashboard showing the user is logged in as superman.

task_completion.description: Access the page to add a new location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Location' form or 'Manage Locations' page is visible in the OpenMRS interface.
The text 'Pediatrics Ward' is typed into the 'Name' input field on the Add Location form.
The text 'Ward for pediatric inpatient care' is typed into the 'Description' input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the location is tagged as a 'Visit Location'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'Visit Location' is selected, checked, or added in the tags section of the location form.
A success message (e.g., 'Location saved') is displayed, or 'Pediatrics Ward' is visible in the saved locations list.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the OpenMRS interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the Bahmni/OpenMRS UI, rather than terminal commands like curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenMRS Administration UI, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to inject the success message or location name into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected location name is 'Pediatrics Ward'. The expected description is 'Ward for pediatric inpatient care'. The expected tag is 'Visit Location'. The task must be completed in the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin).
